data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. BE A COWBOY made it two minor placings on the trot when beaten third (19.76) in a T3 RSTW at this track last time out. Key player on best and expected to bounce back. 2. GREYSYND JAIN used the rails draw to advantage to get home last time at this track and distance (19.87), scoring by 0.8 lengths. Must include in calculations. 1. TRANSPONDING has been a little hard to follow, missing the frame last time but was a Grade 7 winner three back and returns to 350m where he tends to run well. Can turn it around this time. 8. ASTON PRESTON can find the frame without surprising.","runners":[6,2,1,8],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: HEALESVILLE-R7-Fav Out
